top_signals.title: Oil Advances as US-Iran Deal Remains Elusive: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil climbed as tensions remained elevated in the Middle East, with negotiations over a permanent US-Iran ceasefire showing little sign of a breakthrough.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC sues Privvy founder over $12.3 million crypto scheme as AI ‘bots’ turn out to be neither
top_signals.summary: The SEC alleges Fuller spent misappropriated funds on a roughly $1 million house, gambling, trading cards, travel and a Jeep.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Oil Declines Lift Stocks to Fresh Records - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Oil Declines Lift Stocks to Fresh Records  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AI-Driven Port Security: Innovations Transforming Maritime Operations
top_signals.summary: The increasing automation around port and cargo operations sees greater use of remotely tracked and operated sensors and camera systems to deliver operational efficiency, security and greater safety across the huge footprint of any modern port.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hiroshima hibakusha group’s head, Mimaki, steps down
top_signals.summary: Hiroshi Harada, 86, deputy leader of the group of hibakusha atomic bomb survivors and former head of the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Museum, will succeed Mimaki.
